---
title: "R"
description: "Le langage R"
---

:construction:


## Projet

Fichier .Rproj


## Renv

Pour fixer les versions de packages

*Renv.lock*

ou

```{.txt filename="DESCRIPTION"}
Package: a
Type: Book
Title: Introduction à R
Encoding: UTF-8
Date: 2026-02-04
Version: 0.0.1
Depends:
    questionr,
    tidyverse
```




## Ressources {.unnumbered}

<https://juba.github.io/tidyverse/>{target="_blank"}
